name: kush
description: Teaches agentic tools to run isolated, non-interactive Kubernetes commands against a specific context using `kush exec`, and to avoid the interactive subshell commands.

interface.shortDescription: Run Kubernetes tools through isolated kube contexts.
interface.longDescription: Teaches Codex to prefer `kush exec <context> -- <command>` for scoped, non-interactive Kubernetes work, keeping the user's active kube context untouched and avoiding interactive subshell commands.
defaultPrompt: List pods in my kube context with kush.
Run a helm command through kush exec.
